caption: A person wearing a black shirt and a white baseball cap is seen in a close-up shot, positioned amidst a large quantity of stacked trading card boxes. The boxes are primarily blue and white, featuring the red "TOPPS" logo and the text "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" and "EARLY 2020." A watermark is visible on the screen, displaying the text "CASEBREAKS.COM" alongside a logo. The person is interacting with a small brown cardboard box, holding it up toward the camera. As the sequence progresses, the person shifts their position slightly and continues to handle the small box while remaining surrounded by the high stacks of Topps packaging. The background is filled with the repetitive pattern of the blue and white boxes, creating a dense wall of merchandise around the individual.
